assignment_description:
Welcome to Tanglewood
⍞ Materials: A Wonder Book for Girls and Boys

➜ INTRO
This is a book of imaginary stories from the ancient world before some men knew of the true God.

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Tanglewood Porch" p.1-4 "Beneath the porch" - "the next spring."

• ILLUSTRATE - Draw a scene from the story using watercolor or another medium such as chalk, pastels, or crayons. If an alternative to watercolor is needed, students may illustrate using another medium with which they are comfortable (e.g. pencil, chalk, finger paint, Lego, puppets, etc)
